title: ZoomEase
description: Adds balanced zooming in and out, and quick spy-glass usage.
body: ZoomEase adds lightweight zoom controls to Minecraft without changing vanilla mechanics. Holding C gives a small zoom for inspecting details, while Ctrl + C widens your view to better see your surroundings. If a spyglass is in your hotbar and you’re already zooming in, right-clicking automatically switches to the spyglass. The mod is client-side and preserves normal item interactions unless the player clearly signals zoom intent.
